zh.Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利

zh.St. Mary, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, En: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Triplett於1548年11月25日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利時，他的父親John Triplett23歲，母親Elizabeth Larkin23歲。他於1565年與Judith Jackson在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1574年在他的家鄉享年26歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Triplett于1548年11月25日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利时，他的父亲John Triplett23岁，母亲Elizabeth Larkin23岁。他于1565年与Judith Jackson在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利聖 馬也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1574年在他的家乡享年26岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

variants.name: Triplet
meanings: English: variant of   Triplett  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Triplett was born on 25 November 1548, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John Triplett, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Larkin, was 23. He married Judith Jackson in 1565, in St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1574, in his hometown, at the age of 26, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Triplett est né le 25 novembre 1548, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Triplett, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Larkin, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Judith Jackson en 1565, à St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1574, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghams: St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Triplett am 25. November 1548 in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Triplett 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Larkin 23. Er hat 1565 in St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England Judith Jackson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1574 im Alter von 26 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Triplett è nato il il 25 novembre 1548 nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John Triplett, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Larkin, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Judith Jackson nel 1565, nel St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1574, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Triplettが1548年11月25日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーで生まれた時，父John Triplettは23歳，母Elizabeth Larkinは23歳であった。1565年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリースト マリ'ス チャーチでJudith Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1574年に故郷で26歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリースト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghams: 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Triplett(이)가 1548년 11월 25일 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Triplett(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Larkin(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1565년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 Judith Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1574년 그의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Triplett nasceu em 25 de novembro de 1548, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Triplett, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Larkin, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Jackson em 1565, em St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.St Mary's Church, Aylesbury, Buckinghams: ст мэри'с чурч, аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Triplett родился 25 ноября 1548 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Triplett было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Larkin, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Jackson в 1565 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1574 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия.
